mapper.select: SELECT m.ORG_ID AS orgId, m.MESSAGE_ID AS messageId, m.MESSAGE_NAME AS messageName, m.MESSAGE_DESC AS messageDesc, m.MESSAGE_TYPE AS messageType, m.PARENT_MESSAGE_ID AS parentMessageId, m.HEADER_YN AS headerYn, m.REQUEST_YN AS requestYn, m.TRX_TYPE AS trxType, m.PRE_LOAD_YN AS preLoadYn, m.LOG_LEVEL AS logLevel, m.BIZ_DOMAIN AS bizDomain, m.VALIDATION_USE_YN AS validationUseYn, m.LOCK_YN AS lockYn, m.CUR_VERSION AS curVersion, m.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, m.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId FROM FWK_MESSAGE m WHERE m.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND m.MESSAGE_ID = #{messageId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_MESSAGE ( ORG_ID, MESSAGE_ID, MESSAGE_NAME, MESSAGE_DESC, MESSAGE_TYPE, PARENT_MESSAGE_ID, HEADER_YN, REQUEST_YN, TRX_TYPE, PRE_LOAD_YN, LOG_LEVEL, BIZ_DOMAIN, VALIDATION_USE_YN, LOCK_YN, CUR_VERSION, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{dto.orgId}, #{dto.messageId}, #{dto.messageName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.messageDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.messageType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.parentMessageId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.headerYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.requestYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COALESCE(#{dto.trxType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '1'), COALESCE(#{dto.preLoadYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N'), #{dto.logLevel, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.bizDomain, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COALESCE(#{dto.validationUseYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N'), COALESCE(#{dto.lockYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N'), COALESCE(#{dto.curVersion, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 1), #{lastUpdateDtime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastUpdateUserId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: UPDATE FWK_MESSAGE SET MESSAGE_NAME = #{dto.messageName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MESSAGE_DESC = #{dto.messageDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MESSAGE_TYPE = #{dto.messageType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PARENT_MESSAGE_ID = #{dto.parentMessageId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, HEADER_YN = #{dto.headerYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REQUEST_YN = #{dto.requestYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TRX_TYPE = COALESCE(#{dto.trxType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TRX_TYPE), PRE_LOAD_YN = COALESCE(#{dto.preLoadYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PRE_LOAD_YN), LOG_LEVEL = #{dto.logLevel, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BIZ_DOMAIN = #{dto.bizDomain, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, VALIDATION_USE_YN = COALESCE(#{dto.validationUseYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, VALIDATION_USE_YN), LOCK_YN = COALESCE(#{dto.lockYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LOCK_YN), CUR_VERSION = COALESCE(#{dto.curVersion, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, CUR_VERSION), LAST_UPDATE_DTIME = #{lastUpdateDtime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID = #{lastUpdateUserId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND MESSAGE_ID = #{messageId}
mapper.sql: m.ORG_ID AS orgId, m.MESSAGE_ID AS messageId, m.MESSAGE_NAME AS messageName, m.MESSAGE_DESC AS messageDesc, m.MESSAGE_TYPE AS messageType, m.PARENT_MESSAGE_ID AS parentMessageId, m.HEADER_YN AS headerYn, m.REQUEST_YN AS requestYn, m.TRX_TYPE AS trxType, m.PRE_LOAD_YN AS preLoadYn, m.LOG_LEVEL AS logLevel, m.BIZ_DOMAIN AS bizDomain, m.VALIDATION_USE_YN AS validationUseYn, m.LOCK_YN AS lockYn, m.CUR_VERSION AS curVersion, m.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, m.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId

m.ORG_ID AS orgId, m.MESSAGE_ID AS messageId, m.MESSAGE_NAME AS messageName, m.MESSAGE_DESC AS messageDesc, m.MESSAGE_TYPE AS messageType, m.PARENT_MESSAGE_ID AS parentMessageId, m.HEADER_YN AS headerYn, m.REQUEST_YN AS requestYn, m.LOCK_YN AS lockYn, m.CUR_VERSION AS curVersion, m.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, m.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId
mapper.select: SELECT mf.ORG_ID AS orgId, mf.MESSAGE_ID AS messageId, mf.MESSAGE_FIELD_ID AS messageFieldId, mf.SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder, mf.DATA_TYPE AS dataType, mf.DATA_LENGTH AS dataLength, mf.SCALE AS scale, mf.ALIGN AS align, mf.FILLER AS filler, mf.FIELD_TYPE AS fieldType, mf.USE_MODE AS useMode, mf.REQUIRED_YN AS requiredYn, mf.FIELD_TAG AS fieldTag, mf.CODE_GROUP AS codeGroup, mf.DEFAULT_VALUE AS defaultValue, mf.TEST_VALUE AS testValue, mf.REMARK AS remark, mf.LOG_YN AS logYn, mf.CODE_MAPPING_YN AS codeMappingYn, mf.MESSAGE_FIELD_NAME AS messageFieldName, mf.MESSAGE_FIELD_DESC AS messageFieldDesc, mf.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, mf.VALIDATION_RULE_ID AS validationRuleId, mf.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId, mf.FIELD_FORMAT AS fieldFormat, mf.FIELD_FORMAT_DESC AS fieldFormatDesc, mf.FIELD_OPTION AS fieldOption, mf.FIELD_REPEAT_CNT AS fieldRepeatCnt FROM FWK_MESSAGE_FIELD mf WHERE mf.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND mf.MESSAGE_ID = #{messageId} ORDER BY mf.SORT_ORDER ASC

if.test: searchField != null and searchValue != null and searchValue != ''

when.test: sortBy != null and sortBy != '' and sortDirection != null and sortDirection != ''

choose.when:
ORDER BY
m.MESSAGE_ID m.MESSAGE_NAME m.MESSAGE_TYPE m.ORG_ID m.PARENT_MESSAGE_ID m.CUR_VERSION m.LOCK_YN m.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME m.MESSAGE_ID
ASC DESC

mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT ORG_ID FROM FWK_MESSAGE ORDER BY ORG_ID ASC
SELECT VALIDATOR_ID FROM FWK_VALIDATOR WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY VALIDATOR_ID ASC
SELECT DISTINCT MESSAGE_TYPE FROM FWK_MESSAGE WHERE MESSAGE_TYPE IS NOT NULL ORDER BY MESSAGE_TYPE ASC
SELECT m.MESSAGE_ID AS messageId, m.MESSAGE_NAME AS messageName FROM FWK_MESSAGE m WHERE m.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND m.HEADER_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY m.MESSAGE_ID ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_MESSAGE_HISTORY ( ORG_ID, MESSAGE_ID, VERSION, MESSAGE_NAME, MESSAGE_DESC, MESSAGE_TYPE, PARENT_MESSAGE_ID, HEADER_YN, REQUEST_YN, TRX_TYPE, PRE_LOAD_YN, LOG_LEVEL, BIZ_DOMAIN, VALIDATION_USE_YN, LOCK_YN, HISTORY_REASON, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID ) SELECT m.ORG_ID, m.MESSAGE_ID, #{version}, m.MESSAGE_NAME, m.MESSAGE_DESC, m.MESSAGE_TYPE, m.PARENT_MESSAGE_ID, m.HEADER_YN, m.REQUEST_YN, m.TRX_TYPE, m.PRE_LOAD_YN, m.LOG_LEVEL, m.BIZ_DOMAIN, m.VALIDATION_USE_YN, m.LOCK_YN, #{historyReason}, #{lastUpdateDtime}, #{lastUpdateUserId} FROM FWK_MESSAGE m WHERE m.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND m.MESSAGE_ID = #{messageId}

INSERT INTO FWK_MESSAGE_FIELD_HISTORY ( ORG_ID, MESSAGE_ID, MESSAGE_FIELD_ID, VERSION, SORT_ORDER, DATA_TYPE, DATA_LENGTH, SCALE, ALIGN, FILLER, FIELD_TYPE, USE_MODE, REQUIRED_YN, FIELD_TAG, CODE_GROUP, DEFAULT_VALUE, TEST_VALUE, REMARK, LOG_YN, CODE_MAPPING_YN, MESSAGE_FIELD_NAME, MESSAGE_FIELD_DESC, VALIDATION_RULE_ID, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID ) SELECT f.ORG_ID, f.MESSAGE_ID, f.MESSAGE_FIELD_ID, #{version}, f.SORT_ORDER, f.DATA_TYPE, f.DATA_LENGTH, f.SCALE, f.ALIGN, f.FILLER, f.FIELD_TYPE, f.USE_MODE, f.REQUIRED_YN, f.FIELD_TAG, f.CODE_GROUP, f.DEFAULT_VALUE, f.TEST_VALUE, f.REMARK, f.LOG_YN, f.CODE_MAPPING_YN, f.MESSAGE_FIELD_NAME, f.MESSAGE_FIELD_DESC, f.VALIDATION_RULE_ID, #{lastUpdateDtime}, #{lastUpdateUserId} FROM FWK_MESSAGE_FIELD f WHERE f.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND f.MESSAGE_ID = #{messageId}
mapper.select: SELECT VERSION AS version, HISTORY_REASON AS historyReason, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId FROM FWK_MESSAGE_HISTORY WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND MESSAGE_ID = #{messageId} ORDER BY VERSION DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM FWK_MESSAGE_FIELD WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND MESSAGE_ID = #{messageId}
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO FWK_MESSAGE m USING ( SELECT ORG_ID, MESSAGE_ID, MESSAGE_NAME, MESSAGE_DESC, MESSAGE_TYPE, PARENT_MESSAGE_ID, HEADER_YN, REQUEST_YN, TRX_TYPE, PRE_LOAD_YN, LOG_LEVEL, BIZ_DOMAIN, VALIDATION_USE_YN, LOCK_YN, VERSION FROM FWK_MESSAGE_HISTORY WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND MESSAGE_ID = #{messageId} AND VERSION = #{version} ) h ON (m.ORG_ID = h.ORG_ID AND m.MESSAGE_ID = h.MESSAGE_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET m.MESSAGE_NAME = h.MESSAGE_NAME, m.MESSAGE_DESC = h.MESSAGE_DESC, m.MESSAGE_TYPE = h.MESSAGE_TYPE, m.PARENT_MESSAGE_ID = h.PARENT_MESSAGE_ID, m.HEADER_YN = h.HEADER_YN, m.REQUEST_YN = h.REQUEST_YN, m.TRX_TYPE = h.TRX_TYPE, m.PRE_LOAD_YN = h.PRE_LOAD_YN, m.LOG_LEVEL = h.LOG_LEVEL, m.BIZ_DOMAIN = h.BIZ_DOMAIN, m.VALIDATION_USE_YN = h.VALIDATION_USE_YN, m.LOCK_YN = h.LOCK_YN, m.CUR_VERSION = h.VERSION, m.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME = #{lastUpdateDtime}, m.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID = #{lastUpdateUserId} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( ORG_ID, MESSAGE_ID, MESSAGE_NAME, MESSAGE_DESC, MESSAGE_TYPE, PARENT_MESSAGE_ID, HEADER_YN, REQUEST_YN, TRX_TYPE, PRE_LOAD_YN, LOG_LEVEL, BIZ_DOMAIN, VALIDATION_USE_YN, LOCK_YN, CUR_VERSION, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID ) VALUES ( h.ORG_ID, h.MESSAGE_ID, h.MESSAGE_NAME, h.MESSAGE_DESC, h.MESSAGE_TYPE, h.PARENT_MESSAGE_ID, h.HEADER_YN, h.REQUEST_YN, h.TRX_TYPE, h.PRE_LOAD_YN, h.LOG_LEVEL, h.BIZ_DOMAIN, h.VALIDATION_USE_YN, h.LOCK_YN, h.VERSION, #{lastUpdateDtime}, #{lastUpdateUserId} )
mapper.select: SELECT h.ORG_ID AS orgId, h.MESSAGE_ID AS messageId, h.MESSAGE_FIELD_ID AS messageFieldId, h.SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder, h.DATA_TYPE AS dataType, h.DATA_LENGTH AS dataLength, h.SCALE AS scale, h.ALIGN AS align, h.FILLER AS filler, h.FIELD_TYPE AS fieldType, h.USE_MODE AS useMode, h.REQUIRED_YN AS requiredYn, h.FIELD_TAG AS fieldTag, h.CODE_GROUP AS codeGroup, h.DEFAULT_VALUE AS defaultValue, h.TEST_VALUE AS testValue, h.REMARK AS remark, h.LOG_YN AS logYn, h.CODE_MAPPING_YN AS codeMappingYn, h.MESSAGE_FIELD_NAME AS messageFieldName, h.MESSAGE_FIELD_DESC AS messageFieldDesc, h.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, h.VALIDATION_RULE_ID AS validationRuleId, h.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId FROM FWK_MESSAGE_FIELD_HISTORY h WHERE h.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND h.MESSAGE_ID = #{messageId} AND h.VERSION = #{version} ORDER BY h.SORT_ORDER ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_MESSAGE_FIELD ( ORG_ID, MESSAGE_ID, MESSAGE_FIELD_ID, SORT_ORDER, DATA_TYPE, DATA_LENGTH, SCALE, ALIGN, FILLER, FIELD_TYPE, USE_MODE, REQUIRED_YN, FIELD_TAG, CODE_GROUP, DEFAULT_VALUE, TEST_VALUE, REMARK, LOG_YN, CODE_MAPPING_YN, MESSAGE_FIELD_NAME, MESSAGE_FIELD_DESC, VALIDATION_RULE_ID, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID ) SELECT h.ORG_ID, h.MESSAGE_ID, h.MESSAGE_FIELD_ID, h.SORT_ORDER, h.DATA_TYPE, h.DATA_LENGTH, h.SCALE, h.ALIGN, h.FILLER, h.FIELD_TYPE, h.USE_MODE, h.REQUIRED_YN, h.FIELD_TAG, h.CODE_GROUP, h.DEFAULT_VALUE, h.TEST_VALUE, h.REMARK, h.LOG_YN, h.CODE_MAPPING_YN, h.MESSAGE_FIELD_NAME, h.MESSAGE_FIELD_DESC, h.VALIDATION_RULE_ID, #{lastUpdateDtime}, #{lastUpdateUserId} FROM FWK_MESSAGE_FIELD_HISTORY h WHERE h.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND h.MESSAGE_ID = #{messageId} AND h.VERSION = #{version}
mapper.select: SELECT tc.COLUMN_NAME AS columnName, tc.DATA_TYPE AS dataType, tc.DATA_LENGTH AS dataLength, cc.COMMENTS AS comments FROM ALL_TAB_COLUMNS tc LEFT JOIN ALL_COL_COMMENTS cc ON cc.OWNER = tc.OWNER AND cc.TABLE_NAME = tc.TABLE_NAME AND cc.COLUMN_NAME = tc.COLUMN_NAME WHERE tc.TABLE_NAME = #{tableName} AND tc.OWNER = SYS_CONTEXT('USERENV', 'CURRENT_SCHEMA') ORDER BY tc.COLUMN_ID

if.test: searchField != null and searchValue != null and searchValue != ''

mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.trxId, A.ioType, A.orgId) AS RN FROM ( SELECT tm.TRX_ID AS trxId, t.TRX_NAME AS trxName, tm.ORG_ID AS orgId, tm.MESSAGE_ID AS messageId, tm.IO_TYPE AS ioType, m.MESSAGE_NAME AS messageName FROM FWK_TRX_MESSAGE tm INNER JOIN FWK_TRX t ON t.TRX_ID = tm.TRX_ID LEFT JOIN FWK_MESSAGE m ON m.ORG_ID = tm.ORG_ID AND m.MESSAGE_ID = tm.MESSAGE_ID WHERE 1=1
) A ) WHERE RN BETWEEN #{offset} + 1 AND #{endRow} ORDER BY RN
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_TRX_MESSAGE tm INNER JOIN FWK_TRX t ON t.TRX_ID = tm.TRX_ID WHERE 1=1
